packageRules.description: Bundle non-plugin library bumps from the version catalog and every KMP sourceSet dependency block (common/jvm/js/wasmJs/native/apple) into one PR. The Gradle manager reads coordinates from the build files rather than resolving per-target graphs, so dependencies added for any target are picked up here.
Group Gradle plugin bumps separately from libraries; collapses the plugin/marker duplicate updates Renovate would otherwise open for a single shared version reference.

Kotlin toolchain lockstep. Kotlin (plugin + stdlib/reflect), KSP, and TestBalloon must move together; TestBalloon's version string encodes the Kotlin version and its releases lag Kotlin, so a Kotlin bump with no matching TestBalloon build breaks the test compile. Approval-gated so the update surfaces on the dashboard and the PR is opened only once a matching TestBalloon build exists.
Group GitHub Action updates; digests stay SHA-pinned via helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests.
